---
title: "agentic-ml-plugin"
date: '2026-03-18'
categories: [project, ai, agents, claude code]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/agentic-ml-plugin"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/agentic-ml-plugin"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/agentic-ml-plugin"
stars: 1
project_lang: "Python"
---

An agentic machine learning plugin that lets AI assistants run ML workflows autonomously — data prep, training, evaluation — without needing to prompt each step manually.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/agentic-ml-plugin)
